---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- ============ NAVBAR ============ -->
<nav class="sp-nav">
  <a href="/" class="sp-nav-name">Saroj Pathak</a>
  <ul class="sp-nav-links">
    <li><a href="/research.html">Research</a></li>
    <li><a href="/tools.html">Tools</a></li>
    <li><a href="/about.html">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="/contact.html" class="sp-nav-active">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- ============ CONTACT CONTENT ============ -->
<main class="sp-contact">

  <div class="sp-about-header">
    <span class="sp-hero-label">Contact</span>
    <h1 class="sp-about-title">Get in touch</h1>
  </div>

  <div class="sp-contact-body">

    <p class="sp-contact-lead">
      For consulting enquiries, research collaboration, or to discuss 
      a specific question about Nepal's public finance and governance 
      data — reach me directly by email.
    </p>

    <a href="mailto:your@email.com" class="sp-contact-email">
      your@email.com
    </a>

    <div class="sp-contact-elsewhere">
      <span class="sp-section-label">Elsewhere</span>
      <div class="sp-contact-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/yourusername" target="_blank" class="sp-contact-link">
          <span class="sp-contact-link-label">GitHub</span>
          <span class="sp-contact-link-sub">Code and analysis repositories</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile" target="_blank" class="sp-contact-link">
          <span class="sp-contact-link-label">LinkedIn</span>
          <span class="sp-contact-link-sub">Professional background</span>
        </a>
        <a href="https://rpubs.com/sarojpathak" target="_blank" class="sp-contact-link">
          <span class="sp-contact-link-label">RPubs</span>
          <span class="sp-contact-link-sub">Earlier and exploratory work</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="sp-about-rule"><hr></div>

</main>

<!-- ============ FOOTER ============ -->
<footer class="sp-footer">
  <span class="sp-footer-name">Saroj Pathak · Kathmandu, Nepal</span>
  <ul class="sp-footer-links">
    <li><a href="mailto:your@email.com">Email</a></li>
    <li><a href="https://github.com/yourusername" target="_blank">GitHub</a></li>
    <li><a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></li>
  </ul>
</footer>
```
